narrative:
Catawba Island 1 (precinct in Ottawa County) has 510 registered voters, with 45.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.1 percentage points.
